name: Ruben Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together except sauerkraut and cheese.
2. Shape mixture into 5 patties, each about 3/4-inch thick.
3. Set oven control to broil or 550°F. Place patties 4 inches from the heat.
4. Turn patties once and broil until desired doneness is reached (about 10-15 minutes).
5. Top each patty with sauerkraut and a cheese slice.
6. Continue broiling until the cheese melts and turns light brown.
7. Serve on toasted rye or pumpernickel buns or bread.
